application.name: Writing
application.coreAction: Open to a blank page, write, and tap Done to keep the session.

constraints: The writing surface is ready on open: no onboarding, no splash ceremony, no permission requests.

completion.predicate: The person taps Done to end the session.

feedback.onCompletion: The kept session appears at the top of the past-sessions list.
feedback.onInterruption: The draft is exactly where it was left; a killed process never loses committed text.

accumulated.description: Kept sessions accumulate as a reverse-chronological log of plain text files. A log, not a dashboard.

visualDirection: a blank page with a ready cursor
the session list is quiet and secondary to the writing surface
implementationNotes: AppConfig.swift is the single configuration seam: feature flags plus key slots.
Session files are written atomically; the sidecar records startedAt, endedAt, and characterCount.
The share card renders locally and goes straight to the system share sheet.

operatorNotes: bun run setup writes app.config.json and the xcconfig the Xcode project reads; secrets stay out of git.
The fastlane beta lane is prepared, never executed without explicit owner approval.
